message:
perf(freeze): unroll sum loop with 4 independent accumulators

Break data dependency chain by using 4 separate accumulators,
allowing instruction-level parallelism. Process 4 elements per
iteration then combine at the end.

Before (direct iteration): 72ms
After (unrolled): 35ms (~2x faster)
vs Bun: 50ms (EdgeBox now 1.4x FASTER)
